# Al Hassa

**Summary**: An oasis and agricultural region in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] collected plant samples from Al-Asfar Lake located in Al-Hassa.

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] studied the Al-Hassa area to understand its complex subsurface heterogeneity and groundwater systems.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] not stated in source

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] studied the Al-Hassa area to understand its complex subsurface heterogeneity and groundwater systems.

## Formations Present

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] not stated in source

## Key Findings From This Location

- The lake is characterized by various vegetation communities including wetland, sabkha, and dune types. ([[2015-bello|Bello, 2015, p. 42]])

- The study revealed a complex interplay of tectonic stresses that shaped the region's subsurface over geological time. ([[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024, p. 20]])
